plan_mutations.effect: Replace the impossible absolute-green all-target clippy interpretation with the locked zero-new-diagnostic differential while keeping every non-clippy gate absolute green.

Replace the scheduling-sensitive v1 fingerprint anchor with two locked Cargo --keep-going runs per base/final side and a digest-pinned byte canonicalizer; retain every v1 boundary, differential rule, and absolute-green non-clippy gate.

checks: clippy v2 canonical protocol: base/final each two runs, canonical SHA-256 3288d73619aea821118069484194941edd5f83484a0baa2297be633f1c89fbd3, zero new/removed/changed fingerprints
exact six-path scope, five provenance trailers, git diff --check, and clean worktrees: PASS
limitations: Managed runtime behavior was tested with disposable fake executables; no real Codex, credential, network, or external effect was invoked.
The all-target clippy command remains exit 101 because of the pinned pre-existing baseline; the accepted v2 protocol proves an identical non-owned multiset and no owned increase or new fingerprint.

reviews.basis: Fresh Opus read the complete one-commit six-path diff and independently reproduced the pinned clippy v2 protocol, fmt, 145 managed-Codex tests, full framework tests, scripts/verify.sh, exact trailers/scope, deterministic receipts, ambient and credential denial, unmanaged byte compatibility, and clean base/final repositories.
limitations: The review used fake executables and performed no live Codex, network, credential, or external-effect invocation.
The unchanged pre-existing clippy baseline remains red and is not represented as absolute green.

pm_decisions.basis: The same-owner final commit satisfies the accepted clippy-v2 mutation, every absolute-green gate passed, fresh independent Opus approved after reproducing the risk-critical protocol, and the exact local substrate/dev fast-forward preserved a clean repository.
residual_gates: AP-05 still requires R-046/R-048/R-056/R-054/R-057/R-058/R-052 containment, topology, lifetime, final-build, and hostile proof.
R-029 must execute the sanitized installed personal-account path before any runtime claim.
This acceptance grants no app runtime, live effect, release, or submission tier.
